LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.NoActiveOverrides: No active overrides. Click "Add" to manually allow or disallow a specific item.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.AddItemTooltip: Add an item to this filter
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.AddModTooltip: Add a mod to this filter
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.WhitelistModTooltip: Whitelist: allow items from selected mods
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.BlacklistModTooltip: Blacklist: disallow items from selected mods
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.LooseTooltip: Loose: allow items without this property
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.StrictTooltip: Strict: disallow items without this property
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.AddCategoryTooltip: Add a category to this filter
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.WhitelistCategoryTooltip: Whitelist: allow items in selected categories
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.BlacklistCategoryTooltip: Blacklist: disallow items in selected categories
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.WorkerNoValidDef: Worker: no valid SpecialThingFilterDef found for the given names.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CmdBadDefs: Unknown defName(s): {0}. Use -u to skip invalid names.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CmdBadMods: Unknown PackageId(s): {0}. Use -u to skip invalid IDs.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CmdBadCats: Unknown ThingCategoryDef(s): {0}. Use -u to skip invalid names.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CmdValueNoProp: Missing property name after -d (StackLimit or Mass).
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CmdValueNoV: Missing -v with two numeric values (min max).
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CmdValueBadProp: Unknown property: {0}. Valid: StackLimit, Mass, or 'path.to.int'.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CmdBadEnumVals: Unknown enum value(s): {0}. Use -u to skip invalid values.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.SaveDuplicateName: A filter set with this name already exists.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.PasteAndMessage: Add disallowed items from the clipboard.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.PasteOrMessage: Add allowed items from the clipboard.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CmdBadItemDefs: Unknown ThingDef(s): {0}. Use -u to skip invalid names.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CopiedApparel: Copy apparel filter to the clipboard.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.CopiedFood: Copy food filter to the clipboard.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.ApplyEmptyWarning: No applicable filters. Enable at least one filter in mod settings.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.IntroductionContent:
[New Buttons]

Storage Zone - Invert
A new "Invert" button between "Clear All" and "Allow All" flips the allow/disallow state of every item in one click. Filter statuses are not affected.

Storage Zone - Expand/Collapse One Level
Two arrow buttons beside the search bar expand or collapse the item category tree one level at a time, avoiding the lag of expanding all categories at once.

Storage Zone - Paste Settings
Right-click the "Paste Settings" gizmo to access two overlay modes in addition to vanilla overwrite:
 · Add Allowed (OR): currently disallowed + clipboard allowed → allowed
 · Add Disallowed (AND): currently allowed + clipboard disallowed → disallowed
HP and quality ranges remain unchanged for these special paste operations.

Policy Management - Copy/Paste
Outfit and food policy dialogs now include Copy and Paste buttons, each with an independent clipboard. Paste offers Overwrite, Add Allowed, and Add Disallowed modes.

Policy Management - Advanced Filter
Outfit and food policy dialogs now include an "Advanced Filter" button that opens the filter-component dialog. The preview is context-aware: apparel policies show only apparel items; food policies show only items with Nutrition > 0.

[New Filters]

This mod adds 10 SpecialThingFilter workers in 5 complementary pairs:
 · Perishable / Non-Perishable — whether refrigeration is needed
 · Deteriorating / Non-Deteriorating — whether it degrades outdoors
 · Has Quality / No Quality — whether it has quality grades
 · Has Hit Points / No Hit Points — whether it has durability
 · Non-Stackable / Stackable — stack limit is 1 or 2+
All filters are based on static ThingDef properties for predictable results.

[Filter Category]

These new filters, together with selected vanilla static-property filters, are grouped under a new "Filter" category at the top of the filter tree.

[Apply Filter]

The "Apply" button in the filter category pushes filter-worker states down to individual ThingDefs (disallowed filter → disallow matching items) and then re-allows the filter workers. The list of participating filters can be configured in mod settings. Only static-property filters are recommended.
LanguageData.UR.BetterFilter.TabAppliableDesc: 'Apply' in this mod only applies to the following Filters. By default, only static ThingDef property filters (non-behavioral) are included.
